title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Selling Stock Photos Without PayPal — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a photographer looking to sell stock photos, but you're based in Nigeria and PayPal is not available in your country. You're not alone. Many creators face this issue due to geographical restrictions, banking limitations, or KYC requirements. You need a reliable alternative to PayPal that allows you to sell your digital products, including stock photos, without any hassle. But what are your options? Let's break it down.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal is a well-known payment processor, but it has a long list of restricted countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, Pakistan, and many others. Stripe is another popular option, but it also has limitations when it comes to certain countries and types of transactions. Gumroad is a platform specifically designed for selling digital products, but it's not available in all countries and has its own set of restrictions. Meanwhile, NOWPayments is a cryptocurrency payment processor that allows you to accept payments in over 300 coins, without any KYC or account requirements.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal and Stripe have strict policies when it comes to countries with high-risk activities, which can lead to account freezes or even closure. Gumroad also has its own set of restrictions, including limitations on certain types of digital products. NOWPayments, on the other hand, is a crypto-native infrastructure that allows you to accept payments globally, without any geographical restrictions. This means you can sell your stock photos to customers from anywhere in the world, without worrying about your payment processor freezing your account.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

PayPal and Stripe charge high fees for transactions, especially when it comes to international payments. Gumroad also has its own set of fees, which can add up quickly. NOWPayments, however, charges low fees for cryptocurrency transactions, and you only pay for what you sell. This means you can keep more of the money you earn from selling your stock photos.
PayPal and Stripe charge high fees for international payments, while NOWPayments offers low fees for cryptocurrency transactions.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

PayPal and Stripe require you to set up separate accounts and integrate them with your website, which can be a hassle. Gumroad has a built-in platform for selling digital products, but it's not flexible when it comes to automation and delivery. NOWPayments, on the other hand, offers a fully automated delivery system, which means you can set up your store and start selling your stock photos immediately. With NOWPayments, you can also customize your delivery process to fit your specific needs.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're based in a restricted country and want a reliable alternative to PayPal, NOWPayments is the way to go. With its crypto-native infrastructure, low fees, and automation capabilities, you can sell your stock photos to customers from anywhere in the world, without worrying about your payment processor freezing your account. Plus, with the Full Stack Bundle, you get everything you need to set up a successful online store, all in one payment.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Gumroad has strict restrictions on digital products, while NOWPayments allows you to sell a wide range of digital goods, including stock photos.
